violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Napkins are stored under the FOH hand sink in contact with the drain line.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Neither the men's or women's bathroom has a self closing door.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Neither bathroom has working ventilation.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustical drop ceiling tiles in the BOH prep area are not solid, sealed, or easily cleanable.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Close open bag/box of bread in walk in freezer. Store oil containers away from unprotected drain lines at hand sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store napkins away from unprotected drain lines under hand sink. Store beverage lids away from garbage can at customer self service counter.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Men's restroom door not self closing. Adjust closing device to ensure door closes properly.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Ventilation fans not working properly in restrooms. Ensure proper operation is maintained.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Acoustic style ceiling tiles in BOH prep and storage area not designed properly.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
